summary: Completed testing of AI Calibration Learning Loop + Price Calibration Analytics feature. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified overview cards, categories table with all columns, status badges, approve buttons, and sidebar navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: AI Calibration routes well-structured with proper auth (require_m2), admin-only access for analytics
Outlier protection correctly implemented (>200% delta skipped)
Min samples safety correctly enforced: observation<5, suggested 5-9, ready>=10
Calibration factor lookup has fallback without city match
Upsert pattern used for approve to prevent duplicates
seed_data_creation: Pre-seeded with 38 calibration events. Боядисване/София has approved calibration factor 1.15x
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Calibration feature fully tested. Route: /ai-calibration. Backend endpoints: POST /api/ai-calibration/record-edit, GET /api/ai-calibration/overview, GET /api/ai-calibration/categories, POST /api/ai-calibration/approve, GET /api/ai-calibration/approved. Calibration auto-applies to AI proposals via get_calibration_factor() in ai_proposal.py. Frontend page at AICalibrationPage.js shows overview cards, categories table with status badges (observation/suggested/ready/approved), and approve buttons for suggested/ready categories. ExtraWorkModal calls record-edit when user clicks 'Приеми и добави'.

backend_record_edit_basic.notes: POST /api/ai-calibration/record-edit records event with correct delta_percent calculation

backend_record_edit_unchanged.notes: Records event with was_edited=False and delta_percent=0 when prices unchanged

backend_overview_endpoint.notes: Returns total_proposals, accepted_unchanged, manually_edited, acceptance_rate, avg_edit_delta_percent, top_corrected_categories

backend_min_samples_status.notes: Status correctly set: observation <5, suggested 5-9, ready >=10

backend_approve_upsert.notes: Approving same category updates existing rather than duplicating

backend_calibration_in_proposal.notes: AI proposal applies approved calibration factor when matching calibration exists

frontend_overview_cards.notes: 5 overview cards displayed: AI proposals (38), accepted (5), edited (33), accuracy (13.2%), avg delta (+11.6%)

frontend_categories_table_columns.notes: All 11 columns present: Категория, Град, Малко к-во, Случаи, Редакции, Ср. AI цена, Ср. крайна цена, Медиана Δ, Коефициент, Статус, Действия

frontend_approve_button_visibility.notes: 'Одобри' button visible for suggested/ready categories (2 found), not for observation

frontend_active_badge.notes: 'Активно' badge displays for approved calibrations (1 found - Боядисване/София)

frontend_sidebar_nav_link.notes: 'AI Калибрация' link in sidebar between 'Дейности' (idx=3) and 'Присъствие' (idx=5)

frontend_search_filter.notes: Search filter works - filtered to 2 rows when searching 'Боядисване'

mocked_apis.note: NO MOCKED APIS - Real LLM + real calibration data
